mapper.select: SELECT role_id AS roleId, role_name AS roleName FROM role ORDER BY role_id

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.email, u.phone, u.address, u.birth FROM user u INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = u.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT st.user_id AS userId, st.name AS userName, st.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, st.email, st.phone, st.address, st.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{parentId}) pa INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON pa.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user st ON sp.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = st.role_id

SELECT pa.user_id AS userId, pa.name AS userName, pa.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, pa.email, pa.phone, pa.address, pa.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{studentId}) st INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON st.user_id = sp.student_id INNER JOIN user pa ON sp.parent_id = pa.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = pa.role_id
